description: Pharmaverse-derived raw demographics mapped to SDTM DM outputs (10 cases, including ambiguity-heavy hard cases).

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID (zero-pad SITEID to 3 digits, SUBJID to 3 digits). For this case USUBJID_PREFIX acts as the study identifier component and SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent date (IC_DT), rounded down (integer)
- SEX: map per CDISC CT — "M" (Male), "F" (Female), "U" (Unknown)
- RACE: CDISC CT values only. Use uppercase. Standard values: WHITE, BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN, ASIAN, AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE, NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER, OTHER, UNKNOWN.
- RFSTDTC = date of first investigational product administration. In this record IC_DT (informed consent date) is the proxy for first dose because no separate IP_START_DT is supplied. IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format — convert to ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code. United States = "USA".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID. SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits in this record. USUBJID_PREFIX is the study identifier component.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent date (IC_DT), rounded down (integer)
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" or "F"
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "Black Or African American" maps to "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN".
- RFSTDTC: IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format (day first). Convert to ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD. No separate dose date is provided so IC_DT serves as RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. United States = "USA".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + "-" + SITEID_RAW + "-" + PATNUM. SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits.
- AGE = integer years, rounded down
- SEX: CDISC CT — Male -> "M"
- RACE: CDISC CT uppercase. "American Indian Or Alaska Native" -> "AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE".
- IC_DT format is DD/MM/YYYY. Day is the first two digits. Convert to YYYY-MM-DD for RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY: United States = "USA".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + "-" + SITEID_RAW + "-" + PATNUM. SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits.
- AGE = integer years at informed consent
- SEX: Male -> "M", Female -> "F"
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "White" -> "WHITE".
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY (day-month-year). RFSTDTC = IC_DT converted to YYYY-MM-DD.
- SPONSOR NOTE: IC_DT field is the only date available; use it as RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY: United States = "USA".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + "-" + SITEID_RAW + "-" + PATNUM.
- AGE = integer years
- SEX: Female -> "F"
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "Black Or African American" -> "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN".
- IC_DT is DD/MM/YYYY. The first two digits are the day; the middle two digits are the month. Convert to ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD for RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY: United States = "USA".

cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = USUBJID_PREFIX + "-" + SITEID_RAW + "-" + PATNUM. SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits.
- AGE = integer years
- SEX: Male -> "M"
- RACE: CDISC CT uppercase. "White" -> "WHITE".
- IC_DT is in DD/MM/YYYY format. RFSTDTC = IC_DT converted to YYYY-MM-DD ISO 8601.
- COUNTRY: United States = "USA".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID (zero-pad SITEID to 3 digits, SUBJID to 3 digits). SITEID_RAW is already 3 digits here.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent date (IC_DT), rounded down
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male), "F" (Female), "U" (Unknown)
- RACE: CDISC CT values only. "Hispanic or Latino" is ETHNICITY not RACE — code RACE as "UNKNOWN" if no separate race category is given. "Multiracial" maps to "OTHER". Valid RACE values: WHITE, BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN, ASIAN, AMERICAN INDIAN OR ALASKA NATIVE, NATIVE HAWAIIAN OR OTHER PACIFIC ISLANDER, OTHER, UNKNOWN.
- RFSTDTC = date of first investigational product administration (field: IP_START_DT or FIRST_DOSE_DT). NOTE: consent date (IC_DT or CONSENT_DT) must NOT be used as RFSTDTC. In this case IC_DT is the only date field — use it as RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3 code. United States = "USA".
- SITEID must be zero-padded to 3 digits.

SPONSOR RACE CODING NOTE (ICD v2.1, Appendix C): When a subject self-reports a Hispanic/Latino identity without specifying a separate racial category, RACE must be coded as "UNKNOWN". This is a common EDC entry error — do not infer race from ethnicity.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID. Zero-pad SITEID to 3 digits. SITEID_RAW "703" is already 3 digits.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent date (IC_DT), rounded down
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" or "F"
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "Black Or African American" -> "BLACK OR AFRICAN AMERICAN".
- RFSTDTC = date of first investigational product administration. This is the FIRST_DOSE_DT field, NOT the consent date (CONSENT_DT). Both dates are in DD/MM/YYYY format. When FIRST_DOSE_DT and CONSENT_DT differ, always use FIRST_DOSE_DT as RFSTDTC.
- COUNTRY: United States = "USA".

SPONSOR DATE PRIORITY NOTE (Protocol 4.5): Consent precedes dosing but is never the reference start date. RFSTDTC must reflect the actual first IP administration. Confusing CONSENT_DT with FIRST_DOSE_DT is a frequent mapping error in CT-ONC-201 data.

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID. SITEID must be zero-padded to 3 digits. A raw SITEID_RAW of "7" becomes "007" in the submission identifier.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent date (IC_DT), rounded down
- SEX: CDISC CT — "M" (Male), "F" (Female)
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "White" -> "WHITE".
- RFSTDTC = IC_DT converted from DD/MM/YYYY to ISO 8601 YYYY-MM-DD.
- COUNTRY = ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. Germany = "DEU", Japan = "JPN", South Korea = "KOR", Australia = "AUS", France = "FRA", United Kingdom = "GBR".

SPONSOR SITE-ID PADDING NOTE (Section 7.2, Appendix A): All site identifiers in USUBJID must be exactly 3 digits. Single-digit site numbers (e.g., "7") must be left-padded with zeros to produce "007". Failing to pad site IDs produces USUBJIDs that do not match the sponsor master subject list.

SITE-COUNTRY MAPPING (Appendix A): When COUNTRY_NAME is absent, derive COUNTRY from the site cluster assignment. Site 7 is assigned to the Germany cluster; use "DEU".

cases.task_description: Convert this raw demographic record into an SDTM DM-style output with exactly these fields: USUBJID, AGE, SEX, RACE, RFSTDTC, COUNTRY. Return only those six fields - no extras.
cases.study_context:
Study: CT-ONC-201 — Phase 2 Oncology Study (Solid Tumours)
Sponsor: Veritas Pharmaceuticals

PROTOCOL RULES FOR DM DOMAIN (Section 7.2):
- USUBJID = STUDYID + "-" + SITEID + "-" + SUBJID. Zero-pad SITEID to 3 digits. SITEID_RAW "701" is already 3 digits.
- AGE = age in years at informed consent, rounded down. Source field may vary by EDC vendor — accept AGE_YRS, IT.AGE, or similar.
- SEX: CDISC CT — Female -> "F". Source field may be GENDER_TEXT, IT.SEX, or similar.
- RACE: uppercase CDISC CT. "White" -> "WHITE". Source field may be RACEN, IT.RACE, or similar.
- RFSTDTC: Source field is DATE_OF_CONSENT (DD/MM/YYYY). No separate IP start date is provided in this record; use DATE_OF_CONSENT converted to YYYY-MM-DD.
- COUNTRY: ISO 3166-1 alpha-3. Source field may be NATION, COUNTRY_NAME, or similar. United States = "USA".

SPONSOR NOTE (ICD v2.1): Some EDC installations in this study export non-standard field names (SUBJECT_NO, INVESTIGATOR_SITE, GENDER_TEXT, RACEN, NATION, AGE_YRS). These are functionally equivalent to PATNUM, SITEID_RAW, IT.SEX, IT.RACE, COUNTRY_NAME, and IT.AGE respectively. Map by meaning.
